{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "## Finding

**Location**: `core/src/shared/secure-fetch.ts:52-54`

The localhost exception allowed `localhost` and `127.0.0.1` but did not cover `0.0.0.0`, `[::1]` (IPv6 localhost), or the full `127.0.0.0/8` loopback range.

## Status

**Fixed in v0.2.136** — Localhost detection now covers `localhost`, `127.0.0.1`, `[::1]`, `0.0.0.0`, and the full `127.x.x.x` range.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xw57-23p8-9wc5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T19:07:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xw57-23p8-9wc5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xw57-23p8-9wc5"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T19:07:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security/advisories/GHSA-xw57-23p8-9wc5", "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/commit/25d1fb491d99479efdf501f5f75e0bb80c908f0a", "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/commit/293124c51bf797c0f5cdae32981110545850a893", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xw57-23p8-9wc5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security-advisories/GHSA-xw57-23p8-9wc5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs", "summary": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: Localhost bypass incomplete (IPv6, 0.0.0.0, 127.x range)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T19:07:24Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xw57-23p8-9wc5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.2.136", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.2.136"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: Localhost bypass incomplete (IPv6, 0.0.0.0, 127.x range)
